conservative.name: Eviscerator
conservative.requirements: Melee weapon, engaged with target, target must have rolled a Chaos Star G during his most recent turn

success.description: You hit for normal damage, and the attack has a Pierce rating equal to the number of Aggression dice used on this attack
As above, +1 critical. The target gains the Overwhelmed condition until he receives medical aid

chaosStar.description: The target can make an immediate attack against you. You cannot use any Active Defences against this attack

sigmarsComet.description: If your target is KO'd by this attack, convert an additional wound into a critical wound

reckless.name: Skulls For The Skull Throne!
reckless.requirements: Melee weapon, engaged with target, target must have rolled a Chaos Star G during his most recent turn

success.description: You hit the target for normal damage, +1 critical
As above, but ignore the target's Soak Value

boon.description: You inflict an amount of extra damage equal to the number of Aggression dice you used on this attack

bane.description: You gain the Exposed condition while this card is recharging

chaosStar.description: The target can make an immediate attack against you. You cannot use any Active Defences against this attack

sigmarsComet.description: If your target is KO'd by this attack, convert an additional wound into a critical wound
